sessions.title: "Self-Driving" SOC: Why AI Needs a Human Pilot
sessions.description:
The industry is buzzing about the “Autonomous SOC”, but the “AI-only” narrative often falls short of reality. In this session, Deepwatch dissects the true division of labor in a modern defense strategy: where AI shines (massive data synthesis, query generation) and where humans are non-negotiable (nuanced decision-making, critical risk acceptance). Learn why the future of SecOps isn't about replacing analysts and how Deepwatch MDR combines its Agentic AI Ecosystem with elite human experts to deliver outcomes that algorithms alone cannot match.



By attending this session, your contact information may be shared with the sponsor for relevant follow up for this event only.

sessions.title: [U.S. Military & Veterans]  Leading AI & Cloud from Uniform to Corporate
sessions.description: Join veteran leaders from Google Cloud and Google Public Sector—including CEO Karen Dahut (Navy Veteran), CTO Will Grannis (Army Veteran), and Managing Director Earl Matthews (Air Force Veteran)—for a dynamic panel exploring the transition from military service to tech leadership. This session, tailored for active service members and veterans, bridges mission-first experience with market demands. The discussion will cover three critical areas: translating military discipline into corporate strategy, diving into technical scaling and compliance challenges, and providing a career roadmap for senior leaders looking to manage large-scale digital transformation and AI initiatives

sessions.title: 10x productivity with the Gemini CLI
sessions.description: Learn how to create and automate complex workflows using the Gemini CLI. Join this session to explore how to use features like Agent Skills and subagents to boost team productivity, and how to iterate through all phases of the software development life cycle with greater speed and efficiency.

sessions.title: 2026 M-Trends Report
sessions.description: Stay ahead of the latest cyberthreats with frontline insights from Mandiant incident response investigations. In this 17th edition of M-Trends, we share our observations and analysis of the dynamic threat landscape, and aim to provide you with actionable guidance to enhance your security posture.

sessions.title: 2026 M-Trends Report
sessions.description: Stay ahead of the latest cyberthreats with frontline insights from Mandiant incident response investigations. In this 17th edition of M-Trends, we share our observations and analysis of the dynamic threat landscape, and aim to provide you with actionable guidance to enhance your security posture.

sessions.title: A deep dive into Gemini Enterprise governance, security, and compliance
sessions.description: As enterprises graduate from initial AI pilots to full-scale production, the focus shifts from “What can generative AI do?” to “How do we govern and secure it at scale?” Join this technical deep dive that unpacks the multilayered security architecture of Gemini Enterprise, providing a blueprint for deploying, orchestrating, and governing complex agent ecosystems. We’ll go beyond theory into the practical implementation of defense-in-depth strategies, dissecting the three critical AI security layers – content, network, and identity – and demonstrating how to implement centralized governance. You’ll leave with a comprehensive enterprise-readiness checklist, equipping you with the specific controls needed to launch secure, compliant AI agents today.

sessions.title: A guide for production AI: Insights from ElevenLabs, Glean, and Lovable
sessions.description: Join leaders from ElevenLabs, Glean, and Lovable as they open their playbooks on how enterprise customers are building and scaling AI workloads in production. Gain must-have strategies for solving complex deployment challenges and leave with actionable, real-world insights for navigating the 'last mile' of AI implementation.

sessions.title: A masterclass in managing billions of GCS objects and beyond
sessions.description: Are hidden costs and security risks lurking in your storage? Join us to discover how Storage Intelligence transforms metadata into actionable value. We’ll debut new dashboards that automatically surface anomalies, alongside security dashboards featuring DSPM integration for granular risk posture. Learn directly from customers how they maintain total visibility over petabytes of data. You'll leave with a roadmap to shift from reactive monitoring to proactive, AI-driven optimization.

sessions.title: A peek into the future: How agents transform SRE
sessions.description: Site reliability engineering (SRE) teams can no longer scale linearly to manage the complexities of modern microservices. Agents are evolving from simple chatbots into an autonomous “AI army” capable of managing the entire service life cycle. This session provides a technical playbook for deploying a swarm of specialized agents – from architect and rollout agents to troubleshooting and maintenance agents. Learn how Google and PayPal use an SRE orchestrator agent to correlate signals and reduce blast radius. Join this session and leave with a blueprint for transitioning from human-in-the-loop oversight to fully autonomous, self-healing operations.

sessions.title: Accelerate AI adoption: Strategies for upskilling and managing change
sessions.description: Buying AI is easy; getting people to use it is the challenge. This session will provide a leader’s playbook for driving AI fluency and a culture of innovation. Learn from leaders who have navigated the human side of learning AI skills. Discover proven programs ranging from “Gemini Stars” champion networks to role-based AI training. You’ll leave with change-management frameworks, measurement tactics, and new Google resources to fast-track your teams to accomplish more with Gemini Enterprise and Google Workspace.

sessions.title: Accelerate data science and analytics with GPUs
sessions.description: Data teams rely on pandas and scikit-learn for their simplicity, but performance degrades as datasets grow. This session reveals how to break those barriers without abandoning the tools you know. We will show you how to use GPUs in Colab Enterprise to accelerate standard Python workflows. Using NVIDIA libraries like cuDF and cuML, we will demonstrate how to drop-in replace libraries to achieve massive speedups. Join us for a live demo where we flip the switch to GPUs with zero code changes.

sessions.title: Accelerate domain AI agents on Google Cloud Vertex AI with NVIDIA NeMo and NVIDIA Nemotron
sessions.description:
Join NVIDIA experts to explore how the NVIDIA NeMo framework and Nemotron models integrate with Google Cloud Vertex AI to deliver a frontier-scale  platform for building and deploying domain-specialized AI agents. We'll cover the technology stack, showing how NVIDIA’s models,  libraries, and Blackwell GPUs, combined with Vertex AI made for efficient training, fine-tuning, RL, and scalable inference

The session will feature a real-world case study from leading cybersecurity provider CrowdStrike, illustrating how they use this suite of solutions on Vertex with NVIDIA Blackwell GPUs to fine-tune LLMs for cybersecurity, accelerating threat detection and response.

We’ll close by offering learnings and best practices to customize Nemotron and other open models from the Vertex AI Model Garden.

sessions.title: Accelerate research at scale with Gemini and Google AI infrastructure
sessions.description: In research, an often overlooked but critical metric is the time it takes to go from data to discovery. This session will dive deeper into AI and the supercomputing architectures and ecosystems that can turn massive datasets into breakthroughs. Learn how Google’s AI-optimized hardware and powerful models like Gemini come together to accelerate research, leading to new discoveries and scientific breakthroughs. Encounter leaders who are building a new engine for scientific discovery marked by greater efficiency and unprecedented innovation.

sessions.title: Accelerate your path to AI readiness with Google Cloud VMware Engine
sessions.description: Legacy systems are throttling AI ambitions. Your journey to becoming an AI-driven, innovation-first business must begin with a foundational shift. Learn how Google Cloud VMware Engine provides a low-friction solution for fast, easy migration and modernization. VMware Engine transforms your VMware estate with speed and confidence, enabling you to move existing systems without re-architecting apps and to continue using familiar tools and skill sets. Join us for exciting new announcements and to learn how to rapidly accelerate your cloud-to-AI transformation.

sessions.title: Accelerating the agent lifecycle: From concept to commercialization
sessions.description: In the race for the agentic enterprise, speed is your competitive advantage. Explore how to drastically reduce time-to-market for high-quality AI agents, transforming complexity into repeatable processes. Learn to fast-track the lifecycle using the Agent Development Kit and Gemini Enterprise for efficient, governed deployment. Leave with a strategic roadmap for validating solutions on Google Cloud Marketplace and turning innovation into revenue.

sessions.title: Accelerating the next wave of intelligent innovation with NVIDIA and Google Cloud
sessions.description:
AI is transforming every industry, and NVIDIA and Google Cloud are delivering the foundation for it. By combining NVIDIA’s performance-optimized accelerated computing stack with Google Cloud’s AI platform—including Google Kubernetes Engine, Vertex AI, Cloud Run, and Google Distributed Cloud—we’re enabling enterprises, startups, and developers to train and serve frontier models, power agentic AI applications, accelerate analytics, and run industrial and physical AI at scale —across all models, modalities, and workloads, to solve real business challenges and build new products.

sessions.title: Achieve sovereign control over your AI with Google Workspace
sessions.description: Rapid adoption of generative AI is essential for enterprise innovation, but it must not come at the expense of data security and sovereignty. That’s why Google offers the most compliant, enterprise-ready AI capabilities designed for regulated industries and global organizations. Discover how institutions are innovating at pace while maintaining absolute privacy and sovereignty over their AI data through hyperlocal operations and controls. Turn sovereignty into a competitive advantage and secure your AI deployment.

sessions.title: Activate an AI-native workforce and drive enterprise productivity
sessions.description: Discover how SIGNAL IDUNA is redefining insurance by deploying an enterprise-scale digital workforce to drive productivity. This session explores how the work between SIGNAL IDUNA and Deloitte enabled the rapid launch of thousands of Gemini Enterprise seats, empowering departments with tools like the Health Assistant. Learn how we archived high active usage and continue to build and scale an agentic AI framework, bridging the gap between regulatory requirements and agentic innovations.

sessions.title: Advance medicine and healthcare outcomes with Gemini
sessions.description: Healthcare leaders are tasked with advancing patient care and outcomes while navigating a maze of data silos, regulatory hurdles, administrative burdens, and legacy systems. Join leaders who are turning those challenges into opportunities for innovation, equity, and improved patient outcomes – reimagining the future of healthcare by harnessing the power of Gemini. This session will provide the blueprint for building a more connected, intelligent, and secure healthcare ecosystem that drives meaningful and lasting change in public health.

sessions.title: After software: Anthropic's vision for the next era of enterprise AI
sessions.description:
Enterprise software will change more in the next two years than it has in the last twenty. The model is inverting: top-down planning, where organizations define and prioritize what gets built, is giving way to bottom-up execution, where AI agents help teams solve problems as fast as they find them. Anthropic shares what we're seeing at the frontier. Teams are already deploying agents on Vertex AI that define, build, and iterate autonomously. We'll ground the vision in real examples and practical frameworks for readiness.



By attending this session, your contact information may be shared with the sponsor for relevant follow up for this event only.

sessions.title: Agent Identity as the backbone for secure AI innovation
sessions.description: The rise of agents demands a fundamental shift in how we define identity. In this session, we’ll share how Google Cloud is unifying agent, human, and nonhuman identity into a standards-based platform designed for a new AI landscape. We’ll also explore how to move beyond the security risks of long-lived, impersonable keys to a future built on open standards like Secure Production Identity Framework for Everyone (SPIFFE). Learn how we’re elevating agents to first-class citizens in the identity and access management world, giving them verifiable, cryptographic identities that allow them to operate with autonomy, security, and full governance. Get the blueprint for securing the transition from human-driven tasks to agent-driven innovation.

sessions.title: Agent value
sessions.description: Get excited and drive interest in Gemini Enterprise and it's agent-building capabilities and learn about the practical, everyday applications about AI agents. Get inspired to think creatively about building agents to solve unique challenges and leave with a chief of staff agent!

sessions.title: Agentic AI for finance: From closing books to crushing forecasts
sessions.description:
Ready to unlock the next level of financial performance? Join us to explore how KPMG and Google’s Agentic AI platform are redefining what’s possible for finance teams. Discover intelligent AI agents that optimize critical processes—delivering faster closes, smarter forecasts, and sharper insights. Join us to see a real-world demo of how KPMG can help you accelerate your financial close, to drive efficiency, agility, and strategic impact across your organization.







By attending this session, your contact information may be shared with the sponsor for relevant follow up for this event only.

sessions.title: Agentic AI in action for financial services and insurance
sessions.description: The Financial Services and Insurance (FSI) industry faces pivotal challenges in data unification, risk management, and personalized experiences. While AI’s promise is clear, many struggle to move from concept to reality. This session explores how Agentic AI provides tangible solutions across capital markets and banking. We demonstrate precisely how to leverage Google's Agentic Transformation Framework to turn your vision into an operational reality. Learn to scale agents that address pressing FSI issues while maintaining strict compliance.

sessions.title: Agentic AI: wardrobes, webtoons, and the future of personalized experiences
sessions.description:
The era of the ""single prompt"" is over. To solve complex, real-world problems—from automating creator engagement to localizing artistic webcomics—industry leaders are moving toward sophisticated agent architectures. Join Stan and Toonsutra for an inside look at how they orchestrated specialized AI agents to automate creativity, commerce, and personalization at scale on Google Cloud.

Presenting Companies
Stan | The Creator Economy Agent: Discover how Stan (getstan.app) is revolutionizing how creators manage their businesses. Learn how they deployed agentic workflows to automate high-intent interactions, turning a creator's link-in-bio into a proactive sales engine. We’ll break down the architecture behind their ""AI Assistant"" agents that handle everything from lead qualification to personalized product recommendations, allowing creators to scale their impact without increasing their workload.
Toonsutra | The Multimodal Localization Pipeline: India’s #1 webtoon platform reveals their four-agent automated engine for vision-based text extraction and ""chapter-aware"" character profiling, alongside in-context image editing—replacing dialogue inside speech bubbles while perfectly preserving original typography, alignment, and character voice across Indian languages.

sessions.title: Agentic analytics for Looker developers
sessions.description: Writing LookML for humans is one thing; writing it for Conversational AI agents is another. During this roundtable, we'll invite ideas for best practices for grounding LLMs in the semantic layer. Participants will brainstorm "wishlist" features and metadata strategies that help agents provide more accurate, trustworthy answers. Attendees will gain a peer-vetted framework for optimizing LookML for AI.

sessions.title: Agentic commerce: How Ulta and Bunnings re-imagined the shopping experience
sessions.description: Shopping is deeply personal and often complex, whether a customer is building a customized skincare routine or tackling a major home improvement project. Join this session to discover how industry leaders are redefining the digital customer experience by using Google Cloud’s Shopping Agents to move beyond simple search filters and basic transactions. You'll learn how implementing an intelligent, conversational shopping agent can elevate your brand's customer journey from a simple catalog search to a deeply personalized, highly consultative experience that drives both revenue and long term trust.

sessions.title: Agentic commerce: Transform the shopping experience with Google agents and open standards
sessions.description: Imagine an AI agent that can find the perfect product, answer fit questions, verify inventory in real time, and securely complete a purchase – all within a single chat. This session shows how to make that vision a reality and set your business up for success on your own site, AI Mode in Google Search, Gemini, and beyond. Learn to build state-of-the-art agents with product discovery, equipped with user-event optimized recommendations and deep user context. Dive into how to connect your agents to store catalogs, payment processors, and any conversational UI via the Universal Commerce Protocol (UCP). Discover how to establish irrefutable proof of user authorization using the Agent Payments Protocol (AP2). Join us to learn how these protocols – built on the foundations of Model Context Protocol (MCP) and the Agent2Agent (A2A) protocol – are creating a seamless, secure, and open ecosystem for the next generation of online and in-store retail and commerce.

sessions.title: Agentic defense: Security operations at machine speed
sessions.description: Is your security operations center (SOC) drowning in alerts? Join this session for an in-depth look at how you can uplevel your SOC team with a system of AI agents in Google Security Operations. From conducting autonomous investigations before an analyst ever gets involved to new response actions, we’ll share our vision for agentic defense and demo how our Triage, Investigation, Enrichment, and Response Plan agents work together to help you cut through the noise, accelerate mean time to response, and shift your focus to high-priority threats.

sessions.title: Agentic SOC Experience
sessions.description: Let’s move beyond the AI hype, and experience AI that actually helps! Google Cloud Security enables the Agentic SOC with purpose built agents that helps you navigate the complex world of modern security operations, so you can focus on security where it matters most. Explore our most recent innovations - the SecOps Alert Triage Agent and Agentic Google Threat Intelligence in an immersive session led by our Google Cloud Security experts. You’ll acquire real-world skills and practical knowledge to transform your organization’s defenses with Agentic AI.

sessions.title: Agentic Threat Intelligence: Your new AI security teammate
sessions.description: Grow your security team without adding head count. The Agentic Threat Intelligence feature unlocks Google Threat Intelligence’s vast repository of insights via a specialized, conversational AI interface, transforming data into a dynamic security partner. Find out how specialized AI agents assist with threat hunting, intelligence reporting, and malware analysis, and learn how to use conversational AI to automate complex tasks and reduce manual data sifting. You’ll gain insights into how autonomous agents can handle the heavy lifting, making your security operations faster and more efficient.

sessions.title: AgentOps Cockpit: Architecting Agents at Scale with Governance-as-Code
sessions.description: Transition AI agents from Wild West prototypes to reliable production services. This session introduces AgentOps Cockpit, a framework-agnostic Control Plane bridging raw reasoning with enterprise governance. Learn to secure, optimize, and auto-patch multi-cloud fleets (GCP and other cloud providers) using Governance-as-Code for automated Red Team attacks, Zero-Trust PII scrubbing, and Human-in-the-Loop approvals. We also explore FinOps via Hive Mind Semantic Caching and A2A trust. Walk away with a complete blueprint for a resilient, governed AI workforce.

sessions.title: Agents 101
sessions.description: Not sure how to get started with agents? Let's talk about it! Join this roundtable to get your agent-related questions answered. We'll focus our conversation on removing blockers and finding the easiest way for developers to get agents up and running.

sessions.title: Agents in action: Startup breakthroughs across industries
sessions.description: AI agents are transforming operations across every sector. Learn how innovative startups across fintech, legaltech, healthcare, and manufacturing are automating complex workflows, generating insights, and delivering personalized experiences with their agents.

sessions.title: Agents in the CLI: Planning, delegation, and multi-agent execution
sessions.description:
A lot of developers are trying agent-driven workflows in the terminal only to find some patterns don’t scale past small experiments. This talk examines which CLI-based agent patterns hold up in practice using GitHub Copilot CLI as a case study. We’ll look at how developers can plan work, delegate steps, and coordinate multi-step tasks while staying in control. We’ll also look at the tradeoffs that matters when deciding whether these workflows belong in your day-to-day development process (and when switching to your IDE may be more helpful).





By attending this session, your contact information may be shared with the sponsor for relevant follow up for this event only.

sessions.title: AI Agent Developer Meetup
sessions.description: Everyone has a prototype, but who is actually running agents in production? This meetup moves beyond simple prompting to tackle the engineering reality of autonomous systems. No presentations, just peer-to-peer conversations on the hard parts of agentic AI: reliability, multi-agent orchestration, memory management, and cost control. Whether you’re debugging infinite loops or architecting for scale, come trade strategies and connect with peers building systems that actually work. No hype, just engineering.

sessions.title: AI Application Developer Meetup
sessions.description: Bring your topics to this builder-to-builder exchange as we map the modern, responsible AI stack together. Join small-group conversations on the latest shifts in AI development. This collaborative space is for developers tackling the engineering hurdles of production: ensuring accuracy while navigating data privacy, security, and managing costs. Whether you're building a brand new application or adding AI to your existing applications, come share your ideas about modern app development in a casual, relaxed, and fun hangout.

sessions.title: AI DevOps velocity: Self-service platform on Google Cloud
sessions.description: Struggling to scale AI development? Discover how to build an intelligent, self-service Internal Developer Platform (IDP) on Google Cloud. We'll show you how to leverage managed services, Vertex AI, and Cloud Native solutions to streamline traditional and AI workflows. Learn actionable steps for automated pipelines and integrated toolkits that enhance developer experience and accelerate deployment. Expect to see how this approach can achieve a 40-60% ROI by empowering your teams and accelerating innovation.

sessions.title: AI Hypercomputer: Resilient AI infrastructure at scale
sessions.description: Generative and agentic AI inference and training demand extreme performance and uptime. Join us to explore new updates to Google Cloud’s AI Hypercomputer, an integrated supercomputing system optimized to serve your models and agents with industry-leading throughput and latency. In this session, AppLovin will share their real-world experience architecting high-scale model serving on Google Cloud. We’ll also share new capabilities for resiliency and reliability. Leave with a blueprint for building an inference infrastructure that delivers speed without sacrificing stability.

sessions.title: AI in the Physical World with Gemini Robotics
sessions.description: The robotics field is in the middle of an explosion of new developments with a projected $5 trillion in market opportunity by 2050. Come learn about Google's efforts with Gemini Robotics and how our models are being applied today by trusted tester companies ranging from social humanoids to automated heavy construction equipment.

sessions.title: AI Infrastructure Engineer Meetup
sessions.description: Join fellow AI engineers and researchers for a deep dive into the hardware and orchestration powering the AI revolution. We will discuss optimizing AI workloads on GKE and Slurm, managing high-performance GPU and TPU clusters, and navigating the complexities of networking and storage for massive datasets. Whether you are fine-tuning resource allocation or architecting for global scale, come share your strategies and solve infrastructure bottlenecks with the community.

sessions.title: AI migration master class: Architecting whole-estate modernization on GKE
sessions.description: Join this session and move beyond the breakout session to debate the "Gemini for Migrations" strategy in this high-density technical discussion. We'll deconstruct the architecture behind whole-estate migration - apps, infra, and data - using AI to collapse traditional timelines. Bring your specific migration blockers as we will analyze the real-world application of the App Migration Planner, .NET Modernizer, and Gemini Code Assist. We’ll discuss the trade-offs of automated code transformation and developer productivity gains seen at Sonae. You'll leave with a peer-vetted migration playbook and the RAMP framework for GKE.

sessions.title: AI velocity vs. security
sessions.description: Does security act as a launchpad or a parking brake for your AI projects? Join this interactive roundtable to debate the reality of rolling out safe, agentic AI. We’ll dig into the friction between developers and security, and tackle the "truth gap" between executive vision and ground-level reality. Bring your war stories and best practices for aligning velocity with governance.

sessions.title: AI-enabled government professional
sessions.description: In this small roundtable, IT and business leaders will pressure-test how Gemini, NotebookLM, and Canvas cut the time spent searching policies, emails, and docs, turn messy program data into cited briefs, and rapidly draft artifacts like SOPs, RFP responses, and stakeholder updates. You’ll leave with 2–3 repeatable workflows, prompt guardrails, and a rollout checklist.

sessions.title: Applying agentic framework to real world use cases in regulated industries
sessions.description: Move beyond agent hype into compliant AI for Insurance and Finance. This session provides a blueprint for multi-agent systems on Vertex AI. Using Property Insurance and Mortgage cases, we show how to deconstruct high-stakes processes into specialized tasks. Learn to use the Agentic Design Kit (ADK) for traceability and governance. Attendees will leave with a pragmatic playbook for deploying agentic systems that satisfy the most stringent audit requirements while driving radical gains in operational efficiency.

sessions.title: Apps, automation, and agents: The future of building on Google Workspace
sessions.description: With new AI capabilities in Google Workspace, anyone can turn ideas into intelligent automation and custom solutions. In this session, we’ll unveil the next step in the evolution of the Google Workspace platform. We’ll also show how new agentic tools are making it easier than ever to build integrations, automate tasks, and connect to critical apps – all in a unified and secure environment.

sessions.title: Architecting for the agent and beyond: Inside Mattel's product quality world
sessions.description:
In a world of digital noise, ensuring product quality requires precision. Join Insight and Mattel for a deep dive into the engineering journey behind the Conversational Analytics Agent for Product Quality Analysis (PQA). This session moves beyond the code to explore how Mattel integrates Google Cloud AI with Jira to automate complex workflows and drive organizational efficiency. Discover the blueprint for building agents that engineers trust and how this architecture scales to support broader quality goals.



By attending this session, your contact information may be shared with the sponsor for relevant follow up for this event only.

sessions.title: Architecting Gemini Enterprise for regulated industries
sessions.description: "Can we use GenAI without data leaving our perimeter?" For regulated industries, the answer must be a verifiable "Yes." This session whiteboards a Zero Trust GenAI Architecture using Gemini. We design the "Private RAG" pattern for confidential data, tackling three challenges: Perimeter, by configuring VPC-SC and PSC to block public internet traversal; Encryption, via CMEK and Data Residency for sovereignty; and Identity, by architecting ACL propagation to the Vector Database. Leave with a reference architecture that satisfies your CISO.

sessions.title: Architecting intent-driven operations with Gemini Cloud Assist
sessions.description: Manual infrastructure deployments and siloed troubleshooting create massive operational bottlenecks as cloud environments scale. This discussion group will focus on architecting deployments using Gemini Cloud Assist directly from your integrated development environment. Bring your specific DevOps hurdles as we will analyze blueprints for executing secure, authorized cloud operations. You'll leave with an AI-powered operations playbook and a deployment security checklist.

sessions.title: Architecting Multimodal GenAI Applications for Healthcare
sessions.description: Healthcare data is multi-modal, spanning clinical notes, imaging, and genomics. Reasoning across these types is a complex challenge. This talk goes behind the scenes of the Google Cloud Advanced Solutions Lab (ASL) to share insights from building production-ready applications with leading healthcare organizations. We focus on concrete design patterns and architectural best practices using Google Cloud Vertex AI, the ADK, and Agent Engine. Learn how to synthesize diverse data into robust AI solutions that address industry-specific needs.

sessions.title: Architecting voice and chat agent and how these worlds are merging
sessions.description: Join us for an interactive deep dive into the next generation of conversational AI. This collaborative discussion will pull back the curtain on our latest advancements in human-like voice, emotional intelligence, and language fluidity. We’ll open the floor to discuss the shift toward rich, actionable chat UIs - including interactive interfaces and visual branding - and swap insights on the best path toward multimodal agents. Let’s explore together how the world is moving towards a single, unified agent that masters both text and voice effortlessly.

sessions.title: Ask me anything: A conversation with the Cloud Run team
sessions.description: Do you have questions about Cloud Run? We've got answers. Join us to talk about what's new in Cloud Run and learn how it's evolving to meet the needs of the next generation of AI-driven development.

sessions.title: Automate Work with Google Workspace Studio
sessions.description: Learn how to use Google Workspace Studio to automate routine tasks and complex workflows in this foundational, hands-on workshop designed for citizen developers and IT professionals. You will leverage natural language prompts and Gemini AI to build a custom flow that summarizes unread emails and delivers a daily briefing to Chat. You will also learn to use templates and pass data between steps, equipping you with the Studio fundamentals to automate your own daily workflows.

sessions.title: Automating excellence: How Gemini and Config Connector help create 10x cloud teams
sessions.description: Operations are the primary bottleneck in hyperscale cloud environments. Small teams often struggle to manage massive Google Kubernetes Engine (GKE) footprints, drowning in manual toil and configuration drift. The solution lies in a practical architecture for the “10x cloud team.” In this session, we’ll demonstrate how combining Config Connector with Gemini 1.5 Pro manages Google Cloud resources as native Kubernetes objects, bridging the gap between intent and implementation. Learn to use Config Connector reconciliation loops and Gemini to resolve drift and refactor technical debt in real time. Leave with a reference architecture for an AI-augmented Kubernetes control plane.

sessions.title: Avery Dennison scales AI for product development and research excellence
sessions.description:
Avery Dennison is executing an enterprisewide AI strategy designed to accelerate growth. By embedding AI into core applications, and scaling human‑in‑the‑loop adoption and deployment of Gemini, the company is building a foundation for a more intelligent, efficient, and sustainable value chain. Join this session as leaders from Tata Consultancy Services and Avery Dennison explore how to strategically leverage AI to enhance operational resilience, unlock data‑driven growth, and shape the future of digitally enabled product ecosystems.

sessions.title: Banking on intelligence: scaling the future of wealth with Citi and Google Cloud
sessions.description: Join us for an exclusive look at how Citi Wealth is partnering with Google Cloud to discuss the strategic blueprint for modernizing global wealth management. This session explores how Citi is building new AI capabilities to bridge the gap between massive global data sets and hyper-personalized client engagement. Discover the leadership strategies driving a shift toward a proactive, intelligence-led future for financial advisory.

sessions.title: Behind Google's strategic bets in AI: A conversation with the hosts of Acquired
sessions.description: Join Ben Gilbert and David Rosenthal, hosts of the Acquired podcast, for a deep dive into the inflection points that defined Google’s AI infrastructure. In this story-driven spotlight, Google Chief Technologist Amin Vahdat and Google Chief Scientist Jeff Dean, reveal the high-stakes history of the TPU and the secret "build vs. buy" silicon battles that shaped the modern cloud. Discover how a decade of custom hardware, cutting edge software, liquid cooling, and supply chain innovation is now architecting the future of computing for the agentic era.

sessions.title: Best practices for designing and deploying Cross-Cloud Network security
sessions.description: This session will deliver expert guidance on designing and deploying Google Cloud’s Cross-Cloud Network security solutions – protecting your environment against a wide range of network threats, including exploits, malware, distributed denial-of-service attacks, data exfiltration, and more. We’ll cover best practices for configuring Cloud NGFW, Google Cloud Armor, and Secure Web Proxy to address critical security concerns. Come learn how to build a resilient cloud infrastructure to protect your data and apps, wherever they reside.

sessions.title: Beyond memory: Architecting self-evolving agent fleets
sessions.description: While models are evolving, most enterprise agents remain static, until now. In this deep-dive, we apply DeepMind's Nested Learning architecture to build self-evolving AI agent fleets. We will architect a Dual-Velocity system on Google Cloud: a Fast Loop for immediate RAG corrections and a Slow Loop that crystallizes institutional knowledge into agent policy via an Atomic agent building approach. Using Vertex AI Agent Engine and BigQuery, discover how to build Atomic Agents that don't just execute instructions—they rewrite them.

sessions.title: Beyond migration: Engineering the self-optimizing enterprise
sessions.description:
In the age of AI, evolution must be constant rather than project-based. Join us to explore Wingspan 2.0, an Enterprise Intelligence Fabric that unifies data, AI, and operations into a single, self-optimizing engine. Moving beyond cloud migration, you will learn how autonomous agents drive continuous feedback loops and how predictive, self-healing systems stabilize enterprise workloads. We will also debut the "Talk to Data" workbench and the Agentic Data Products Marketplace, designed to turn raw data into revenue.

We cover how to manage state with Cloud Firestore, decouple governance via Eventarc to prevent timeouts, and use OpenTelemetry Semantic Conventions for auditing agent rationale and human decisions for Responsible AI compliance.

Springboard partners will showcase live solutions using Vertex AI, Gemini models, GPUs/TPUs, BigQuery, and GKE—and share how they move from idea to production while delivering performance, reliability, and customer traction.

sessions.title: Strengthen business resilience with Google Workspace AI safety and data governance
sessions.description: AI exposes data security risks and complexity for IT and security teams, raising the urgency to address these issues now. Join this session to learn about Google’s layered, defense-in-depth approach to secure Gemini – including new prompt-injection mitigations – and how to govern AI access to your data in Google Workspace. The session will accelerate your journey of AI deployments, with actionable strategies to secure and govern AI access to your data. Come see product demos and hear from organizations that have safely adopted Gemini.

sessions.title: Strictly confidential: Supercharging AI without spilling secrets
sessions.description: The immense power of AI demands a new standard of trust – one in which Confidential AI protects the models and data that define your future. This session will explore Confidential Computing and how to maintain a cryptographic root of trust across the AI lifecycle. We’ll unveil the latest confidential platforms and demonstrate how trusted execution environments extend from training to inference, keeping data encrypted during active processing. Finally, we’ll dive deep into how customers leverage Google Cloud’s confidential infrastructure to safeguard complex AI workflows.

sessions.title: Supercharge your enterprise apps: High performance unified storage
sessions.description:
Is your data infrastructure keeping up with the demands of your business? Turn your cloud journey into an innovation engine. Join us to see how Google Cloud NetApp Volumes is removing barriers for UKG, a workforce management and human resource management services company. We will discuss how UKG is accelerating their database deployments while achieving high performance and resiliency. In just 20 minutes, learn how to utilize unified storage to optimize your enterprise applications and unleash the next generation of cloud computing.





By attending this session, your contact information may be shared with the sponsor for relevant follow up for this event only.

sessions.title: Supercharging ELT on Google Cloud with Dataform, dbt, and Airflow
sessions.description: In this talk, I’ll walk through a real ELT pipeline on Google Cloud using Airflow, Cloud Composer, and Dataform, built with Qatar FIFA World Cup data. I will then implement the same pipeline using dbt Core deployed on Cloud Run Jobs and compare the strengths and trade-offs of both approaches on GCP. The session also covers DevOps automation and ends with a Looker Studio dashboard to showcase the full data stack in action.

sessions.title: Supercharging unstructured data analytics with generative AI in BigQuery
sessions.description: Learn how BigQuery integrates AI models directly to your data using simple SQL commands to perform tasks entity extraction, classification, and document parsing on unstructured content such as text, images and PDFs. In this session, we’ll showcase practical workflows leveraging Gemini to transform complex multimodal data into structured insights. You'll learn to build highly scalable pipelines with new cost-optimized functions to power your AI agents.

sessions.title: Sweet Success: Reinventing Mars Incorporated's Global Marketing with Cooperative Agents
sessions.description: Bridge the gap between consumer insights and brand creativity with Mars Incorporated’s  “One Demand AI.” This session unveils the agentic system transforming Mars Incorporated’s global marketing lifecycle using Gemini and Vertex AI. We explore shifting from traditional silos to cooperating agents that automate everything from campaign briefings to creative assets. We dissect four pillars: data ingestion, a multi-agent orchestration framework, natural-language UIs, and Google Cloud hosting. Learn how Mars Incorporated operationalizes brand-safe, generative workflows at an enterprise scale.

sessions.title: Talk to your data from Gemini Enterprise: Oracle AI Database + Lakehouse
sessions.description:
Join us for a session on the Oracle AI Database Agent, a powerful tool that enables seamless natural language interaction with your enterprise data within the Gemini Enterprise environment.

This agent automatically translates plain text inputs into optimized SQL queries, executes them against your Oracle AI Database, and returns formatted data interpretations—all within the Gemini experience. Discover how this integration eliminates the need for custom natural language processing pipelines, streamlining your data querying processes and enhancing productivity.





By attending this session, your contact information may be shared with the sponsor for relevant follow up for this event only.

sessions.title: Taming the agent revolution: Governance at enterprise scale
sessions.description: 2026 is the year of the agent, but without governance, innovation becomes chaos. As organizations face rapid agent proliferation, duplication and data risks threaten ROI. This session unveils a blueprint for an enterprise-grade agent platform. We will demonstrate how to operationalize "Agents as Applications" using services like Vertex AI, Apigee, and BigQuery. Learn to centralize discovery, enforce security, and optimize data resources—transforming agent sprawl into a scalable, secure business advantage.

sessions.title: The Agent Factory: The fastest path to production-ready agents
sessions.description: Get on the fast track to building powerful AI agents. Ditch the theory and dive into code to quickly move from idea to deployment. The creators of The Agent Factory podcast share their playbook for rapid tool creation, memory management, and scaling multi-agent systems. You’ll get pro tips on accelerating your workflow, choosing the right frameworks, and mastering key patterns. Take away a practical toolkit of strategies to apply immediately to your projects and supercharge your agent development.

sessions.title: The agentic enterprise: Google Workspace & Gemini Enterprise
sessions.description: To achieve true business transformation, organizations need intelligent systems that enable humans and agents to collaborate across boundaries. Join Yulie Kwon Kim and Maryam Gholami to discover how uniting your data, apps, and AI agents accelerates execution and unlocks capabilities that were previously impossible. We will discuss how Google Workspace and Gemini Enterprise drive tangible impacts to both the top and bottom line, empowering every individual and team to do their best work.

sessions.title: The agentic ROI framework for lean teams
sessions.description: Think big and stay lean. Small IT teams are achieving massive scale using agentic AI. Discover how autonomous agents on Google Cloud handle complex workflows, allowing your team to focus on high-value innovation. We’ll share practical strategies for maximizing ROI with Vertex AI, proving you don’t need a massive head count to drive enterprise-level impact. Join us to learn how to deploy agents that act as force multipliers, reducing manual toil and accelerating growth. Ready to scale your results and your impact? It’s time to win big.

sessions.title: The Agentic SOC: Where to start
sessions.description: Join this interactive discussion to gain practical insights on getting started with AI agents in your SOC.

sessions.title: The agentic workplace unlocked: how Gemini democratizes AI across your business
sessions.description: Real AI transformation requires automating end-to-end workflows, moving beyond individual tasks. As organizations transition from experimentation to holistic integration, they must navigate complex, real-world obstacles. Join us to see how innovators move beyond feature adoption to achieve success with Google Workspace and Gemini Enterprise. We’ll unpack practical strategies to influence culture, overcome friction, and architect agentic workflows that rewire business outcomes and drive enterprise-wide transformation.

sessions.title: The AI-ready enterprise: Securing access and data in an AI-first world
sessions.description: As organizations embed Gemini into every workflow, the traditional network perimeter must evolve into an intelligent, AI-aware service edge. Explore how Palo Alto Networks’ next-generation secure access service edge (SASE) solution protects the enterprise workforce – providing seamless security for every AI interaction across Google Cloud. We’ll discuss a new strategic framework for AI governance, moving beyond simple “allow/block” rules to granular, intent-based controls that prevent data exfiltration and manage “shadow AI” usage. Discover how the native integration between Prisma SASE and Google Cloud’s global infrastructure delivers a high-performance, zero-trust environment that secures every user and every AI interaction. By attending this session, your contact information may be shared with the sponsor for relevant follow-up for this event only.

sessions.title: The future of AI: How startups build competitive moats
sessions.description: As the future of AI takes shape, startups are making big bets on what will matter in the long term. Join leading founders for a real conversation about how they’re building moats beyond the model – what decisions paid off, which ones didn’t, and how they’re thinking about architecture, data, cost, and product today.

sessions.title: The future of the data lakehouse: Open and interoperable for the agentic era
sessions.description: Google Cloud is redefining the open data lakehouse for the agentic era. This session demonstrates our end-to-end, multicloud lakehouse capabilities that help you unify operational data, multimodal storage, and analytics on an interconnected and governed Apache Iceberg foundation. Learn how to enable full interoperability across Apache Spark, BigQuery, and AI services with a singular control plane flexible storage. Discover how to re-engineer your entire data foundation for the speed, scale, and performance needed to power your AI agents.

sessions.title: The human bottleneck: Why great tech fails and how to drive value in AI
sessions.description: You’ve built the future, but is your organization living in it? Most digital transformations don’t fail because the technology is broken; they fail because human habits are hard to break. In this session, lead AI researcher Dr. Fei-Fei Li joins BCG and Google Cloud to reveal the hidden psychological friction that stalls even the most advanced cloud strategies. Discover the science of “making change stick” by aligning technical ambition with human instinct. Join us to move beyond the frustration of wasted investment and learn the practical art of hardwiring innovation into your company’s DNA.

sessions.title: The industry advantage: turning vertical expertise into your competitive edge
sessions.description: In the rush to modernize, many organizations are discovering a critical flaw in their cloud strategy: generic technology applied to specialized industry problems often fails to deliver on its promise. Your business has a unique operational DNA, shaped by decades of specific challenges and opportunities. Why, then, would a one-size-fits-all cloud solution be the answer? It's time to stop building features and start solving problems with an industry-first approach.This session provides a playbook for turning deep vertical expertise into an unbeatable competitive edge. Hear firsthand how leading companies are combining their industry knowledge with the power of Google Cloud to drive real-world results and win in the market.

sessions.title: The journey to agentic applications at Spotify
sessions.description: Spotify is actively deploying agentic applications in their cloud infrastructure. Spotify will share their goals and discuss the top of mind infrastructure considerations that have shaped their journey to support agentic applications. In this talk Spotify will share their experience in adopting MCP in their gRPC environment, implementing AI guardrails and managing multitiered identity for agent interactions. Spotify is exploring model serving optimization with inference gateway extensions and across a wide range of runtime form factors spanning ARM, GPU and TPU. Spotify is building this support on top of a highly reliable regionalized network architecture to which they have recently migrated their entire cloud deployment.

sessions.title: The new productivity frontier: How AI agents are fueling business growth
sessions.description: The emergence of AI agents represents a fundamental shift from reactive tools to autonomous execution. Join Google experts and industry leaders to learn how organizations are using AI agents in Gemini Enterprise to automate workflows and drive business outcomes. We’ll delve into high-impact use cases and break down the key ingredients for success: a unified agentic platform, deep ecosystem integration, and best practices to go from vision to ROI. You’ll come away with a proven recipe for the agentic era and exclusive insights from large-scale AI deployments.

sessions.title: The self-curation engine: Real-time schema mapping with Gemini and Cloud Run
sessions.description: Retail data arrives from disparate sources with inconsistent schemas. To solve this, we present a serverless Cloud Run agent that uses the Gemini API to automate schema mapping. Triggered by new data, the agent compares raw schemas to a BigQuery target and dynamically generates the required SQL or Dataform transformations. This talk highlights how AI automates the most manual parts of data engineering: schema maintenance and logic generation.

sessions.title: The story of Gap Inc.'s AI powered retail evolution
sessions.description: Gap Inc. is reimagining the retail landscape by grounding generative AI in the human experience. This session explores the journey from concept to market, detailing how Google Cloud’s AI became the quiet architecture behind a more intuitive, responsive, and intelligent brand. Join us for a look at the strategy that turned a vision for transformation into a scalable reality.

sessions.title: The ultimate guide to Cloud Run: Go from zero to production
sessions.description: Join this demo-driven session to learn how Cloud Run offers simplicity alongside flexibility for running your code. We’ll begin with a few basic getting-started concepts. Then we’ll explore some “How do I...?” scenarios, such as Virtual Private Cloud (VPC) access, startup probes, configuring for AI agents, and handling persistent storage. And we’ll wrap up with the latest features in preview for Cloud Run. All demos and content will be available as codelabs for you to practice with.

sessions.title: The Unbreachable Browser: Stop Zero-Day Exploits with HEAT Shield AI + Gemini
sessions.description:
Traditional security fails against sophisticated social engineering and zero-day exploits. This session introduces the only AI-driven, proactive defense: Menlo HEAT Shield AI powered by Google Gemini. Unlike web-focused or reactive SSE platforms, Menlo and Google deliver network separation via a hardened digital twin in the cloud with 10x greater precision in detecting zero-day exploits. Learn how multimodal AI renders real-time verdicts—closing the protection gap, reducing SOC toil, and ensuring zero threats reach the endpoint.



By attending this session, your contact information may be shared with the sponsor for relevant follow up for this event only.

sessions.title: The unified journey: Mapping your use case to Google Cloud's Gemini Enterprise for Customer Experience
sessions.description: Is Google Cloud’s Gemini Enterprise for Customer Experience the right engine for your customer goals? Bring your specific customer experience (CX) challenges to this architectural roundtable. We’ll investigate how to combine the Shopping Agent, CX Agent Studio, and Vertex AI Search to solve fragmented journeys. Our SMEs will help you determine the optimal product mix to ensure contextual continuity from discovery through post-purchase support.

sessions.title: The unified pipeline: Multimodal AI across the life sciences value chain
sessions.description: Join this session to explore how multimodal AI integrates diverse data streams to create a unified pipeline, accelerating innovation and precision across the entire life sciences value chain – from early-stage drug discovery and diagnostic development to the global commercialization of medical devices.

sessions.title: ThreatSpace APT Hunting
sessions.description: Join us for an immersive session of threat hunting for APTs in Google’s ThreatSpace range. This is not a demo or a lecture heavy session, just a chance for you to build, test, and hone your threat hunting skills. Everyone is able to participate with different levels of guides to support the security curious to security experts. Use Google Security Operations to determine all threat actor activities and use Google Threat Intelligence to provide attribution. Each day will align to a different APT, so join us to see if you can correctly identify all three APT threat actors. Laptops provided.

sessions.title: Timberlake: Keeping BigQuery and Looker *NSYNC'd
sessions.description: Join us for a compelling, fun, and technical deep dive into Timberlake, our new GenAI LookML Syncing project. We'll explore how we're making manual LookML updates a thing of the past, accelerating development velocity, and keeping BigQuery BI Views and Looker models perfectly NSYNC. Prepare to be amazed by the "choreography" of our Cloud Run services, GenAI models, and Airflow orchestration, all designed to make your data dreams "pop"!

sessions.title: Transform app deployment and management with AI
sessions.description: Modernizing application delivery often leaves “Day 2” operations teams struggling with fragmented tools and manual overhead. In this session, we’ll demonstrate how to simplify application deployments on Google Cloud by using the power of agentic AI to automate complex workflows. And we’ll take you through an end-to-end experience that provides operations teams with robust, out-of-the-box capabilities for ongoing management and monitoring. Discover how intelligent agents can bridge the gap between initial deployment and long-term stability, reducing cognitive load for engineers. Leave knowing how to implement a unified framework that streamlines the entire application life cycle.

sessions.title: Transform cloud operations and management with generative AI
sessions.description: Join us to explore the next generation of AI-driven cloud management. We’ll demonstrate multi-resource intent-driven deployments from IDEs using your private Terraform modules. Discover our feature for quick and deep investigations, which uses trace-based discovery and Cloud Run source code insights for faster troubleshooting. Learn how proactive agents identify anomalies, and how you can safely execute authorized remediations for Google Cloud resources.

sessions.title: Transforming Quest Diagnostics for the future of AI in healthcare
sessions.description: Join us to discover how Quest is accelerating AI transformation to improve patient experience, operational efficiency, and clinical quality by co-building AI solutions with HCLTech and Google Cloud. By attending this session, your contact information may be shared with the sponsor for relevant follow-up for this event only.

sessions.title: Unify data for a strong AI foundation with Salesforce and Google
sessions.description:
A powerful AI strategy is only as strong as the data grounding it. Join us to learn how Salesforce and Google provide the blueprint for a high-ROI AI foundation. We’ll explore how Data 360’s Zero Copy architecture provides instant, secure access to BigQuery and other Google data sources within Salesforce—eliminating costly duplication. See how this trusted data stream fuels Agentforce and Gemini, ensuring your AI agents act on the truth to drive reliable business outcomes.





By attending this session, your contact information may be shared with the sponsor for relevant follow up for this event only.

sessions.title: Unifying your defense: Chrome Enterprise Premium & Google Unified Security
sessions.description: To stay ahead of modern adversaries, your browser security must be an integral part of your broader defense ecosystem. In this session, discover how Chrome Enterprise Premium acts as a force multiplier within Google Unified Security. We’ll explore how Chrome leverages Google’s global threat intelligence to detect risks faster, share critical telemetry, and enforce robust policies at the point of click. Learn how to close the gap between your endpoint and the web for a truly holistic security posture.

sessions.title: Unlock Google Cloud's migration secrets: Security, speed, and scale
sessions.description: Ready to migrate but daunted by the complexity? Discover Google Cloud Migration Center, a unified and intelligent platform to simplify and accelerate your cloud journey. Learn how our AI-powered tools provide insights into your existing landscape, automate app discovery, and generate tailored migration plans, making the move seamless for one application or thousands. Join us to learn how to migrate without changing IP addresses, explore real-world examples, and learn best practices to de-risk your migration and unlock the full, AI-powered potential of Google Cloud.

sessions.title: Using an Agentic SOC to Lower Analyst Toil
sessions.description: In this hands-on workshop, learn how Gemini is being used in Google SecOps to streamline and eliminate toil for analysts. During this workshop, we will use AI is used in SecOps for natural language search, gathering threat intelligence, analyzing alerts and much more. Attendees will come away with a greater understanding of different methods that AI can be used with Google SecOps.

sessions.title: Vibe coding and databases
sessions.description: Share your experiences and questions about using vibe coding to build intelligent, data-driven apps. We’ll cover platforms such as Antigravity, Google Cloud databases where the data is stored, and database integration with MCP and Gemini CLI. Learn how to optimize development workstreams, resolve integration pain points, and unlock new capabilities for your applications.

sessions.title: Web3 startups and AI agents: The future of payments, tokenization, and commerce
sessions.description: Tokenization is taking finance digital. This panel will explore how Web3 startups use AI agents and tokenized assets to power payments, capital structures, and predictive markets. Discover how startups leverage blockchains and agentic AI to build secure, scalable, next-gen financial systems.

sessions.title: What's in the box?
sessions.description: Explore what’s really happening inside AI and LLM systems, and why it matters amid rising costs. As teams move faster with managed models and agent frameworks, spend is driven by token usage, latency, downstream services, and Google Cloud utilization. In this talk, you’ll encounter a practical, cost-first approach to running AI platforms by treating AI tooling like a junior engineer. You’ll also learn how observing LLM workflows and correlating model signals with application telemetry and cloud spend help teams spot inefficiencies, improve user experience, and keep AI innovation from becoming a cost impediment using Datadog. By attending this session, your contact information may be shared with the sponsor for relevant follow-up for this event only.

sessions.title: What's new for AI on GKE: Training, serving, and agents
sessions.description: The requirements for AI infrastructure are shifting rapidly, moving from frontier model serving to complex reinforcement learning and agentic workflows. Google Kubernetes Engine (GKE) has evolved to meet the moment. Join us for a high-speed tour of most critical GKE innovations released in the past year for AI training, serving, reinforcement learning, and agentic workloads. Explore new capabilities designed to make your AI workloads more reliable, scalable, and cost-effective. And take a peek at how Thinking Machines Lab and Baseten are using GKE for their AI workloads.

sessions.title: What's new in AlloyDB: Scale PostgreSQL for agentic AI and hybrid clouds
sessions.description: Demanding transactional, analytical, and AI workloads require more than standard PostgreSQL. In this session, learn how AlloyDB, a 100% PostgreSQL-compatible database, can empower your applications with agentic AI through its latest capabilities, including vector indexing, vector search, and natural language interfaces. Join us to find out what’s new in AlloyDB Omni, the downloadable edition for hybrid and multicloud environments, and gain insights into how to scale your workloads while achieving superior price-performance.

sessions.title: What's new in BigQuery: The data platform for agentic AI
sessions.description: Discover how BigQuery is redefining the modern data and AI stack. Join this session to explore new capabilities for multimodal analytics and performance at scale. Learn how to accelerate AI innovation by bringing generative AI directly to your data for rapid model building and co-processing. Plus, get a preview of the new agentic experiences designed to simplify and automate workflows for every data professional.

sessions.title: What's new in Cloud Run
sessions.description: Explore new Cloud Run capabilities that simplify application deployment for AI agents and inference. This deep dive demonstrates how to power your most demanding workloads with unparalleled efficiency and flexibility. Join this session to learn how to use the latest serverless features to scale your applications seamlessly while reducing operational overhead. And discover how Cloud Run is evolving to meet the needs of the next generation of AI-driven development.

sessions.title: What's new in Cloud SQL: Drive performance, high availability, and security
sessions.description: Explore the latest innovations in Cloud SQL for MySQL, PostgreSQL, and SQL Server. In this session, we’ll discuss how we’re revolutionizing developer productivity and supporting mission-critical apps with uncompromised availability, performance, and security. And we’ll introduce new AI-driven capabilities for automated health management and fleet-wide insights. Join us to learn how Database Migration Service facilitates low-risk moves to the cloud, and gain the essential knowledge you need to optimize your database strategy today.

sessions.title: What's new in Google Cloud databases for the agentic era
sessions.description: The agentic era demands a unified, real-time architecture for delivering relevant, accurate experiences at scale with your enterprise data. Join this session to explore the latest Google Cloud database innovations designed to modernize your estate. Learn how these advancements enable you to quickly build AI apps and agents with multimodal data, while unifying operational and analytical workloads for real-time insights. Elevate the developer experience for frictionless development and simplified database management with AI.

sessions.title: What's new in Google Cloud's agent platform
sessions.description: Explore the next evolution of Google Cloud’s agent platform, designed to empower developers and enterprises to build, scale, and govern sophisticated AI agents. Discover our new, unified Vertex AI Agent Builder, featuring a streamlined UX and a no-code/low-code Agent Designer to simplify the creation of complex, multi-agent workflows. Find out how our new Agent Registry, coupled with the agent marketplace, enables organizations to securely curate and distribute reusable components. Learn how we’re delivering enterprise-grade governance and quality at scale with a unified governance layer, new agent management capabilities, advanced observability with time-travel debugging, an integrated evaluation suite, and a managed simulation platform to ensure your agents are secure, reliable, and continuously improving. From a richer Agent Development Kit (ADK) with expanded language support to native agent-to-agent communication and a secure code execution sandbox, Google Cloud provides a comprehensive ecosystem for the entire agent life cycle.

sessions.title: What's new in Looker: Empowering business users in the governed agentic era
sessions.description: Trusted data defines the agentic era. Learn how Looker and Gemini redefine business intelligence by grounding AI in a governed semantic layer. In this session, we’ll unveil the latest Looker advancements, including dashboard agents that automate workflows and insights. Find out how to scale expertise and ensure consistency with shared pre-trained agents. Join us for an exclusive preview of Conversational Analytics, semantic model evolutions, and the next generation of embedded analytics. Discover how Looker is pushing the boundaries of data for the AI-first enterprise.

sessions.title: What's new in streaming: Real-time data for agentic AI
sessions.description: If AI training is about history, AI value is about real-time data. Join us for a deep dive into Google Cloud’s streaming portfolio. Learn how Anthropic uses this infrastructure for massive-scale model training. We’ll explore major innovations across our managed messaging services, including the introduction of native AI inference within Pub/Sub and enhancements to Managed Service for Apache Kafka. And we’ll cover the latest updates to Dataflow and BigQuery continuous queries. Learn how these services use the Model Context Protocol (MCP) to create a complete real-time data platform for agentic AI.

sessions.title: What's new in the Cross-Cloud Network
sessions.description: The network is the foundation of the AI era, but keeping pace with rapid innovation is a challenge. Falling behind limits your ability to adopt generative AI, agents, and modern apps. Join this session for a comprehensive roundup of all key releases across Cross-Cloud Network, Google Cloud’s global network solution. We’ll cover optimized infrastructure for AI agents, models, and tools; multicloud and enterprise global backbone connectivity; advanced AI-powered network security; and new innovations in self-driving networking operations. Get all the essential updates you need to architect your network for the future.

sessions.title: What's new with data and AI governance: Building the catalog for AI
sessions.description: AI agents are only as intelligent as the data they can access – and only as safe as the governance that constrains them. As you move from simple chatbots to autonomous agents that execute complex tasks, providing raw data isn’t enough. Agents need context: business glossaries, lineage, and semantic meaning. Join this session for a deep dive into the latest evolution of data and AI governance and how you can automatically enrich your data estate with semantic context, turning your catalog into a reliable map for AI.

sessions.title: What's new with Gemini Enterprise
sessions.description: Join us for a comprehensive overview of the latest innovations in Gemini Enterprise, your front door for AI in the workplace. We’ll unveil a host of new capabilities designed to revolutionize your workplace and accelerate business outcomes. Discover the latest platform advancements in agentic AI, new assistance features, an expanded partner ecosystem, and enhanced security and governance. You’ll also get an exclusive sneak peek into the upcoming 2026 product roadmap.

sessions.title: What's new with Gemini from Google DeepMind
sessions.description: Join Google DeepMind for an exclusive look at what’s new with Gemini and the research breakthroughs defining the next generation of multimodal intelligence. We’ll showcase new workflows and demos designed to empower and inspire developers to build and scale agentic applications with Gemini. Discover what Gemini 3’s upgraded model reasoning, expanded context window processing, and enhanced multimodal tool use can enable in Vertex AI. And learn more about the research advancements for Gemini that are driving agent design.

sessions.title: What's new with GKE: A look toward the next decade
sessions.description: For over a decade, Google Kubernetes Engine (GKE) has led the managed Kubernetes industry. As we enter the age of agents and massive inference models, infrastructure requirements are changing. Join this session to explore how GKE is adapting to support agentic workloads and next-generation inference, offering unmatched scale for the world’s largest clusters and better compute capabilities through Autopilot. Whether modernizing enterprise apps or building the next great AI model, discover how GKE is evolving to meet the demands of the next decade.

sessions.title: What's new with Google Distributed Cloud?
sessions.description: Unlock the full potential of Google AI in a sovereign environment. This session demonstrates how to deploy the latest Gemini’s models, agentic tools, and workflows within your most secure sovereign boundaries using Google Distributed Cloud (GDC). We’ll dive deep into the infrastructure making this possible, focusing on the latest high-performance GPUs, software breakthroughs, and new tactical hardware with multi-zone resilience designed for the harshest realities. Learn how GDC is transforming mission-critical operations by supporting complex core enterprise resource planning (ERP) landscapes and enabling advanced decision-making analytics on completely disconnected data. Don’t leave your intelligence behind – join us to learn how GDC delivers tactical advantage and enterprise-scale productivity to the sovereign edge.

sessions.title: What's next in AI infrastructure: Scaling for the agentic and physical AI era
sessions.description: As AI expands to autonomous agents and physical systems, the computing infrastructure powering them must be faster, more dynamic, and highly cost-effective. In this Spotlight session with Mark Lohmeyer, you'll learn how Google’s leading AI infrastructure stack—from custom silicon to open software—is powering the agentic and physical AI era. You will get a firsthand look into Google’s roadmap for next-gen TPU, GPU, and Arm systems, and new storage and networking offerings built for training, RL, and inference. Discover how new software capabilities, including AI Frameworks, GKE, and Vertex AI provide the engineering edge to secure, optimize, and scale your agentic and physical AI initiatives. Plus, you'll see how leading AI labs, digital-native, and enterprise customers leverage Google's full stack to drive transformation in their business.

sessions.title: What’s next in IAM: Security, governance, and runtime defense for AI agents
sessions.description: To scale AI successfully, you need trust - and that starts with a Zero Trust architecture. Google Cloud empowers enterprises to build and govern agents grounded in business data, secured by a modern stack featuring Agent Identity, Identity and Access Management (IAM), Policy-based security controls, and runtime defense via Model Armor. Join this session to explore how Google is securing AI agents, and how these capabilities are rebuilding the foundation of trust for the next generation of cloud computing.

sessions.title: Why AI fails inside organizations (and how to fix It)
sessions.description:
When AI stalls inside organizations, it's rarely because the models aren't powerful enough. In this session, Dr. Rebecca Hinds, Head of the Work AI Institute at Glean, identifies five critical ways organizations either set AI up to drive real results, or set it up to fail. She shows how decisions about roles, rewards, and workflows influence whether capable AI systems transform how people work—and why overlooking these organizational fundamentals is what holds many AI initiatives back.





By attending this session, your contact information may be shared with the sponsor for relevant follow up for this event only.

sessions.title: Women in Tech Happy Hour
sessions.description:
Open to all! Join us in the Community Lounge to celebrate women in tech. This happy hour is dedicated to community building and networking to foster a richer, more collaborative technology ecosystem.

Connect with peers, share insights, and build the professional relationships that drive our industry forward. See you there!

sessions.title: Women In Tech Meetup
sessions.description: Connect with fellow women in tech at this community meetup! Join peer-to-peer conversations about navigating career transitions, breaking into leadership, overcoming imposter syndrome, and building your personal brand. Share real-world experiences with work-life balance, mentorship, and advocating for yourself in the workplace. Whether you're a developer, data scientist, or tech leader, this is your space to exchange insights, tackle shared challenges, and build meaningful connections. All allies welcome!

sessions.title: Workspace Admins Meetup
sessions.description: As the Workspace ecosystem evolves, so does the role of the admin. This meetup is your forum to connect with fellow Workspace admins to engage in peer-to-peer learning, troubleshoot common issues, discuss strategies for AI adoption, hardening your security posture and stay ahead with the latest Workspace updates. Come ready to contribute, learn, and build a stronger Workspace admin community!

sessions.title: Your data, your rules: The verifiable and private future powered with TEEs
sessions.description: Unlock the full potential of sensitive AI workloads without compromising privacy. Trusted execution environments (TEEs) have emerged as a critical technology to address data privacy and collaboration concerns. Learn how to process your most sensitive data within hardware-isolated enclaves, ensuring your AI innovations and datasets remain encrypted in use and exclusively yours. Gain insights from customers on how they are leveraging Confidential Space for new business cases – from enabling a new generation of data clean rooms to helping users verify their identities with online services while keeping underlying information private.

sessions.title: Zero code, zero prompt: From URL to live agent in five minutes
sessions.description: These days, customers do not like waiting and businesses cannot afford long development cycles. Gemini Enterprise for Customer Experience (CX) solves for both scenarios with its Essentials edition. Join this session to learn how to bypass months of heavy coding and deploy empathetic, autonomous service agents in minutes. Discover how these agents instantly execute complex resolutions, freeing your human experts to step in only for moments that demand a personal touch. You'll learn the fastest path to zero wait support and convert your service operations from a cost center into a frictionless growth engine.

sessions.title: Zero to scale: Rapid development with Google Cloud & MCP Toolbox for database
sessions.description: This session tackles AI's biggest production problem — stale, disconnected data. We explore how the Model Context Protocol (MCP) and Google's open-source MCP Toolbox give agents real-time, grounded access to AlloyDB, BigQuery, and Spanner through simple YAML tool definitions. See two live demos: Prism, a multi-database retail agent that routes natural language to the right database; and a DB Builder agent that designs and extends full database backends from a plain English description.
